compliance.assurance_rationale: HITRUST CSF v11 01.b User access management — detecting brute-force credential attacks evidences the authentication-control portion of user access management required for HITRUST certification.
CJIS v5.9.4 5.5.1 Access control — identification — the UC fires on repeated authentication failures against CJI-access accounts, the detection signal CJIS relies on to flag credential compromise.
UK Cyber Essentials Montpellier CE.SAU.1 Secure authentication & access — brute-force detection is the primary monitoring control listed under the authentication requirement.
PSD2 Art.97 Strong customer authentication — brute-force failure rates are one of the transaction-risk signals used to back SCA-invocation decisions.
